hooks.command: jq -n --arg tool "$(jq -r '.tool_name // "Unknown"')" --arg input "$(jq -r '.tool_input | tostring | .[0:200]')" '{"text": "🔔 *Claude needs permission*\n• Tool: ` + "\(" + "$tool" + ")` + `\n• Input: ` + "\(" + "$input" + ")` + `"}' | curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" 2>/dev/null || true
jq -n '{"text": "✅ *Claude task completed*\nSession finished and ready for your review."}' | curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" 2>/dev/null || true

jq -n --arg tool "$(jq -r '.tool_name // "Unknown"')" --arg error "$(jq -r '.tool_response.error // .tool_response.stderr // "Unknown error" | .[0:200]')" '{"text": "❌ *Claude encountered an error*\n• Tool: ` + "\(" + "$tool" + ")` + `\n• Error: ` + "\(" + "$error" + ")` + `"}' | curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" 2>/dev/null || true
